name: Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and chocolate in a double boiler, then cool.
2. Beat in the eggs and salt until light in color and foamy in texture.
3. Gradually add the sugar and vanilla, continue beating until creamed.
4. Add the chocolate mix to the egg mixture by hand (do not use an electric mixer).
5. Fold in the flour until the mixture is uniformly brown.
6. Fold in the nuts until the mixture is uniform.
7. Bake in a 9x13 inch pan at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 25 minutes, or until set. Cut when cool.
